ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIM HEARING. REQUEST IS GRANTED. -PRO TEM: MARK P SCHREIBER-

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRATTESANI. DDS, STEVEN J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MCNAIR, CHRISTINA **** THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT ASSUME THE DEBT OF HER MOTHER AND THEREFORE THE PROPER DEFENDANT SHOULD HAVE BEEN THE ESTATE OF ELVA VERGARI. THIS RULING IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFF FILING ANOTHER LAWSUIT AGAINST THE PROPER DEFENDANT, BUT NOTES THE POSSIBLE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS BAR TO SUCH CLAIM. SEE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 366.2 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,700.00 FILED BY BRATTESANI. DDS, STEVEN J. AS TO DEFENDANT MCNAIR, CHRISTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-23-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY BRATTESANI. DDS, STEVEN J. MCNAIR, CHRISTINA
